posts.title: Now booking custom orders for wedding season
posts.body:
Wedding season is here and the calendar is filling up fast. Bridesmaid robes, monogrammed hankies for the mothers, ring-bearer pillows — if it can hold a stitch, we can make it yours.

Custom orders take two to three weeks this time of year, so if you have a date in mind, reach out soon and we'll save you a spot.

posts.title: Welcome to our new website
posts.body:
We finally have a home on the web! Browse the gallery for past work, shop ready-to-ship pieces, and request custom orders — all in one place.

We'll post shop updates, market dates, and new designs right here. Check back soon.

posts.title: Saturday market haul: new tea towels
posts.body:
Fresh off the hoop: a set of embroidered tea towels in six botanical designs. They come wrapped in twine, ready for gifting.

Find them at the Saturday market this weekend, or grab a set in the shop before they sell through.
